verbatim_text: And just to give you an example, so when I was taking CAR 6 machine learning theory class, the test was to complete 10 problems, 10 stars of problems from a list, and the list was given to us in the first week of class. There's no guesswork. What's even more amazing is there is this problem that is an open problem in machine learning, and if we just prove this saying, we could get an A plus in the first week of class.
